prompt:
Summarize the trade-off below in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'A:' and line 2 must start with 'B:'. Do not add a long intro.

Option A: faster to implement, harder to scale.
Option B: slower at the start, scales better.
Compare polling and webhook in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'Polling:' and line 2 must start with 'Webhook:'.
Summarize local cache trade-offs in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'Pro:' and line 2 must start with 'Con:'.
Compare SQLite and PostgreSQL for a small backend in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'SQLite:' and line 2 must start with 'PostgreSQL:'.
Summarize the trade-off between long context and retrieval in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'Long context:' and line 2 must start with 'Retrieval:'.
Compare monoliths and microservices in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'Monolith:' and line 2 must start with 'Microservices:'.
Compare eager loading and lazy loading in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'Eager:' and line 2 must start with 'Lazy:'.
Compare REST and GraphQL in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'REST:' and line 2 must start with 'GraphQL:'.
Compare batch processing and stream processing in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'Batch:' and line 2 must start with 'Stream:'.
Compare strong consistency and eventual consistency in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'Strong:' and line 2 must start with 'Eventual:'.
Compare vertical scaling and horizontal scaling in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'Vertical:' and line 2 must start with 'Horizontal:'.
Compare using a CDN and serving only from the origin in exactly 2 lines. Line 1 must start with 'CDN:' and line 2 must start with 'Origin:'.
